description: Example adapter-ready benchmark bundle that carries pre-writing materials and maps them into the multi-agent manuscript system author-input surface built on the deterministic harness substrate.
notes: This is a tracked demo bundle for the adapter layer, not an official PaperWritingBench release.
The adapter derives the manuscript topic from source_materials.idea_summary when author_inputs.topic is omitted.

cases.description: A PaperWritingBench-style case should carry idea-summary and venue-guideline context, then map those materials into author inputs that propagate through the manuscript system's planning, briefing, and drafting artifacts.

checks.label: topic
checks.actual: Therapy response trajectories in a multimodal benchmark
checks.expected: Therapy response trajectories in a multimodal benchmark

checks.label: results_section_note_contains
checks.actual: Start the Results with the strongest treatment-response separation.

checks.label: claim_response_kinetics_claim_packet_note_contains
checks.actual: Use this as the opening sentence for the first results subsection.

checks.label: claim_response_kinetics_draft_subsection_note_contains
checks.actual: Use this as the opening sentence for the first results subsection.

metrics.topic: Therapy response trajectories in a multimodal benchmark
metrics.section_note: Start the Results with the strongest treatment-response separation.
metrics.claim_packet_note: Use this as the opening sentence for the first results subsection.
metrics.draft_subsection_note: Use this as the opening sentence for the first results subsection.

idea_summary.title: Therapy response trajectories in a multimodal benchmark
idea_summary.objective: Lead the manuscript with the strongest treatment-associated response divergence and keep the first Results subsection tightly display-backed.

source_materials.experimental_log: The display-backed response claim should anchor the first Results subsection before broader interpretation.
source_materials.guidelines: Start the Results with the clearest quantitative separation and avoid unsupported background expansion.

cases.description: The adapter path should preserve the same guardrail behavior as the repo-local suite when a pre-writing bundle points to an unknown claim id.

checks.label: expected_error_contains
checks.actual: author_content_inputs.json contains unknown claim_ids: claim_not_in_repo. Decide whether to add or replace the underlying fact-sheet/display-item claim before generating drafts.

metrics.error_message: author_content_inputs.json contains unknown claim_ids: claim_not_in_repo. Decide whether to add or replace the underlying fact-sheet/display-item claim before generating drafts.

source_materials.experimental_log: This case is intentionally malformed to verify the unknown-claim stop condition.
